name: small medical clinics managing 50–100 patient intakes/month tool
description: For small medical clinics processing 50–100 patient intakes/month, inefficient intake processes cause delays in patient care. We simplify the intake process instead of manual paperwork and spreadsheets.
target_audience: small medical clinics managing 50–100 patient intakes/month
